route.description: PCH / Northern coastal Highway 1 section from San Francisco over the Golden Gate and through Marin toward Point Reyes Station using local BRouter-derived geometry.
route.surfaceMix: Mostly paved coastal routing with possible gravel connectors; road stress matters more than technical trail difficulty.
route.bestSeason: Broad-season coastal route outside storms; fog, wind, traffic, and holiday congestion are key gates.

resources.water: Urban and Marin services exist but exact water/service points need verification.
resources.food: SF, Marin, Fairfax/San Anselmo corridor, Olema/Point Reyes-area services; hours unresolved.
resources.camping: Route can be planned as a long day or paired with Marin/Point Reyes lodging or camp options; exact overnight plan unresolved.
resources.toiletsShowers: Confirm by campground/service source before riding.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest bike shops before promotion to ride-ready.
resources.longestGap: Measure from resolved geometry before ride-ready promotion.
